headline: How The Investment Story For Quest Diagnostics (DGX) Is Quietly Shifting Now
summary: Quest Diagnostics is back in focus after a slight trim to its modeled fair value, with the price target adjusted to $218.19 from $218.50, a change of about 0.1%. That small move comes alongside a mix of bullish and bearish analyst updates, including new targets and a fresh list inclusion that signal active debate around where the stock should trade. Ahead, you will see how to interpret these shifting targets and keep up with the evolving analyst narrative around Quest. Stay updated as the...
